task_completion.description: Verify the Turbine BEM Simulation is configured with the exact requested parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade simulation definition window showing Cut-in Wind Speed: 3, Cut-out Wind Speed: 25, Losses: 6% (or Efficiency 94%), Range: 1 to 30, Step: 0.5, and checkboxes enabled for Variable Speed and Variable Pitch.

task_completion.description: Verify the simulation was executed and the power curve was generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade interface displaying a computed graph/plot (e.g., Power vs. Wind Speed or Cp vs. Wind Speed) for the NREL 5MW turbine.

task_completion.description: Verify the QBlade project was saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade window title bar showing 'NREL5MW_turbine_sim.wpa' or a file manager/terminal showing the file saved in /home/ga/Documents/projects/.

task_completion.description: Verify the power curve report text file was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the file /home/ga/Documents/projects/power_curve_report.txt.

task_completion.description: Verify the report documents the correct maximum power output, maximum Cp, and approximate rated wind speed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains values close to the NREL 5MW specifications: Maximum Power ~5000 kW (or 5 MW), Maximum Cp ~0.48, and Rated Wind Speed ~11.4 m/s.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the QBlade application to run the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the QBlade GUI open with the NREL 5MW turbine loaded and simulation graphs visible, not just terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: Verify the .wpa file was saved from within QBlade.
integrity.visual_evidence: The QBlade 'Save Project' dialog should be visible in the history, or the QBlade main window title should update to the new filename, rather than the agent just using 'touch' to create an empty file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just hallucinate the report values without running the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in the text report should logically match the peaks and curves visible in the generated QBlade plots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The NREL 5MW Reference Turbine has specific verified operating parameters: Rated Power is approximately 5000 kW (5 MW), Rated Wind Speed is 11.4 m/s, and Maximum Power Coefficient (Cp) is approximately 0.4862. Accept values in the report that are reasonably close to these figures (e.g., Power: 4500-5500 kW, Speed: 10-12 m/s, Cp: 0.45-0.50). Note that 0.593 is the theoretical Betz limit, not the actual Cp for this turbine.
